tasks.name: Employee people-picker 403 fix (lightweight /api/users/search)
tasks.body: Fixed employee-side 403 on the shared PersonPicker by adding a dedicated authenticated user-search endpoint and repointing the frontend to it.
tasks.summary:
- Root-caused 403: PersonPicker (recognition/feedback/performance) called admin-only GET /api/users
- Added GET /api/users/search (isAuthenticated) returning only UserDropdownItem (id/name/email/employeeId), no directory PII
- Backend: searchActiveForDropdown repo query + searchUsersForDropdown service (limit capped 50) + controller endpoint
- Frontend: new searchUsersForPicker RTK query + PickerUser type; repointed PersonPicker
- Added 300ms search debouncing and skip-when-closed to the picker
- Verified backend compile + frontend typecheck clean

tasks.name: Branch cleanup & PR delivery for picker fix
tasks.body: Recovered an accidental auto-commit off dev, put the change on a clean feature branch in both repos, and merged the PRs.
tasks.summary:
- Moved accidental auto-commit off local dev (reset dev to origin/dev; commit preserved on branch)
- Created fix/person-picker-employee-access in both repos from latest origin/dev
- Rebased backend branch onto origin/dev and fast-forwarded local dev
- Verified origin/dev stayed clean (no PII/change leak) in both repos
- Pushed branches; merged PRs frontend #189 and backend #396 to dev, stage, prod
